title: How to use "Install updates" button / Obsolete car

messages.content: # Here is how to fix " Car is obsolete (installed: 1.0; server runs: 1.1) "

## Step 1
> Open Content Manager and select a server in <#1147102029987196978>
## Step 2
> Click "**Install updates**"
## Step 3
> Click on the **3 greens lines**in the top right corner in Content Manager and click install when the download is over.
## Step 4
> - 🚨  __Close and re-open content manager__ 🚨
